MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Karman Guadagni, Esq. (415.991.2152; karman@sggklaw.com) of Stebner Gertler Guadagni & Kawamoto for Plaintiff.
Vanessa Raven, Esq. (916.541.1906; vnr@lmblaw.net) of Low McKinley Salenko, LLP for Defendant.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
